1.title: Instant Impact
1.description: Double Points for New Signings. One Player per Club.

2.title: The Promoted
2.description: Players from the promoted clubs earn double points. One Player per Club.

3.title: The Shield
3.description: Defensive Contributions are worth 10 points. One Player per Club.

4.title: Classic Rivalry
4.description: Double Points awarded for players from Manchester United and Manchester City. Up to 3 players per club. Unlimited Budget.

5.title: Red vs Blue
5.description: Double Points awarded for players from Liverpool and Everton. Up to 3 players per club. Unlimited Budget.

6.title: Young Guns
6.description: Double Points for players aged 23 or under. One player per club. Unlimited Budget.

7.title: Zero to Hero
7.description: Double points for clean sheets for goalkeepers, defenders and midfielders. One player per club. Unlimited Budget.

8.title: Ice Cold
8.description: “Big Chances Scored” return 6 additional points. One Player per Club. Unlimited Budget.

9.title: Iconic
9.description: Players who have been at their club for 5+ seasons earn double points. One Player per Club. Unlimited Budget.

10.title: Winning Feeling
10.description: Double points for all Winning goals. One Player per Club. Unlimited Budget.

11.title: Change the Game
11.description: Double Bonus Points. All Bonus Points awarded are Doubled.

12.title: In Possession
12.description: +6 points for Players who achieve 90 percent pass completion (at least 30 passes attempted).

14.title: Value Creators
14.description: Double Points for Midfielders priced at 7m or under.

15.title: Big Save
15.description: Double Points for Goalkeepers and Defenders priced at 5m or under.

16.title: Striker Deal
16.description: Double Points for Forwards priced at 7.5m or under. Players must be priced at 7.5 or under at deadline of Sat 13 Dec 15:00 to qualify for Double Points.

17.title: Home for the Holidays
17.description: Double Points for players with home fixtures.

18.title: Gift Wrapped
18.description: +6 points for every Big Chance Created.

19.title: Double Celebration
19.description: All goals and assists score double points.

23.title: The Ball-Carrier
23.description: +2 Points for every Successful dribble past an opponent.

24.title: The Aerial Threat
24.description: +4 Points for every Headed goal attempt (on and off target).

25.title: Bragging Rights
25.description: Double Points for Brighton and Crystal Palace players. Up to 3 players per club. Unlimited Budget.

26.title: Classic Rivals
26.description: Double Points for Chelsea and Leeds United players. Up to 3 players per club. Unlimited Budget.

27.title: Old Foes
27.description: Double Points for Nottingham Forest and Liverpool players. Up to 3 players per club. Unlimited Budget.

28.title: Midlands Clash
28.description: Double Points for Wolves and Aston Villa players. Up to 3 players per club. Unlimited Budget.

29.title: 90 Minutes
29.description: +6 points for players who complete 90 minutes and do not get substituted or receive a red card.

30.title: Goal Threat
30.description: +6 points awarded for players who have 3 or more goal attempts (on and off target).

31.title: Creativity
31.description: +6 points awarded for players who create 3 or more chances (3 or more key passes).

32.title: From Distance
32.description: +4 Points for each goal attempt made from outside the penalty area (on and off target).

33.title: Unstoppable
33.description: +4 points for each foul drawn and +10 if fouled for a penalty.

34.title: MVP
34.description: Players who collect the maximum bonus points earn 10 points rather than 3.

37.title: The Golden Glove
37.description: 4 points for every 3 saves rather than 1. Goalkeeper clean sheets are worth 10 points.

38.title: Final Victory
38.description: +8 points for any player on a winning team.
